samples.text: Fish need water to breathe because they use gills. A goldfish is removed from water entirely. Can the goldfish survive for a long time?
Because fish breathe through gills, they require an aquatic environment. A goldfish has been taken completely out of water. Is long-term survival possible for the goldfish?
Aquatic creatures depend on water for respiration via their gill structures. A goldfish is removed from its aquatic environment entirely. Can the goldfish endure for an extended period?
A goldfish breathes using gills, which extract oxygen from water. Without water, the gills cannot function. Can the goldfish survive for a long time without water?
Fish need water to breathe because they use gills. A goldfish is removed from water entirely. The room temperature is 22 degrees Celsius. Can the goldfish survive for a long time?
